message:
feat(web): enhance Command Palette with ARIA accessibility and category icons

- Add ARIA roles (combobox, listbox, option) for screen reader support
- Add aria-label descriptions to experience level filter buttons
- Add aria-pressed state to experience level toggle buttons
- Add aria-selected and aria-activedescendant for keyboard navigation
- Add aria-live region for announcing search results to screen readers
- Add category icons for visual scanning (🎨 Theme, 🧭 Navigation, etc.)
- Add command count per category in headers
- Add aria-describedby linking input to footer hints
- Fix unused 'like' import in bun-repository.ts

Closes phage_explorer-z0ti
